query: SELECT up.userId, u.name, u.role, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.data_sync') as ds, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.excel_import_customers') as ec, JSON_EXTRACT(up.permissions, '$.api_sync_execute') as ase FROM userPermissions up JOIN users u ON up.userId = u.id;
